headline: Merged UP-NS would control half of all rail freight: BNSF CEO
summary: A rival CEO warned the proposed merger of Union Pacific and Norfolk Southern, if approved, would give the transcontinental behemoth a commanding 50% share of all U.S. rail freight. The post Merged UP-NS would control half of all rail freight: BNSF CEO appeared first on FreightWaves.
